autostart_dialog_body:
Please make an exception for the HoliCal app on the following settings page.

This is to make sure that notifications work reliable!
berufsbegleitende_kunst_und_erwachsenenb: Only for in-service adult education and arts education
calendar_permission_prominent_disclosure:
This app requires the calendar permission to display calendar events or save public holidays into your calendar.

The calendar information will only be stored on your device and not uploaded anywhere!
canBeChangedLaterInSettings: Can be changed later in the settings
color_from_calendar: The Colour is taken from the device calendar and can only be changed in the default calendar app.
deviceCalendarEvent: will be saved in the device calendar
enhance_mode_subtitle: Adds calendar cards shadow and animation on the start screens. may impact performance.
export_description: Select an existing calendar to save your public holidays into.
hoefe_march_alptha-KS_auasserschiwyz_hza: Only for the districts of Einsiedeln, Höfe, Marchm the municipality of Alpthal. Secondary school KS Ausserschwyz, the special school HZA and the vocational school KB Lachen.

holiday.kyrillMethod: Day of the Independence of Bulgaria

holiday.politicalEmancipationOfTheStateO: Political emancipation of the state of Paraná
holiday.reclaimIndependenceDay: Day of the establishment of an independent Czechoslovak state
holiday.santaCatarinaDay: Day of Santa Catarina (creation of the captaincy, separating from São Paulo)
holiday.signingOfTheTreatyOfPetropolis: Signing of the Treaty of Petrópolis
holiday.swissThanksgiving: Federal day of thanksgiving, repentance and prayer
holiday.victoryOverNazism: Victory Day over Nazism in World War II
6pmTillMidnight: Part holiday from 6 pm till midnight
7pmTillMidnight: Part holiday from 7 pm till midnight
assumptionDayBavaria: Assumption of the Virgin Mary is a public holiday in Bavaria only in the municipalities with predominantly Catholic population.
chooseGoodFridayOrEasterMonday: Choice between Good Friday and Easter Monday as their statutory holiday.
curpusChristiSaxony: Corpus Christi is a public holiday in the municipalities listed in the Corpus Christi Ordinance. In the remaining municipalities of Saxony, Corpus Christi is protected as a religious holiday by Section 3 (1) of the Saxon Holiday Act.
curpusChristiThuringia: Corpus Christi is a public holiday in the municipalities defined in accordance with § 2 para. 2 and § 10 para. 1 ThürFGtG, see Municipalities Key to Corpus Christi Day.... In the remaining municipalities of Thuringia, Corpus Christi is protected as a religious holiday by § 3 para. 1 No. 2 of the Thuringian Holiday and Memorial Day Act.
defactoHoliday: De facto holiday: not official holidays, but most employees have the day off.
free_or_partitial_free_dependend_on_cont: Work-free or partially work-free in accordance with the collective agreement.
goldCupParade: Observed as a holiday for the provincial government and some employers in the capital region
goodFridayGreece: On Good Friday the operation of shops is prohibited before 12:00 noon and after 19:00 in the afternoon. Usually the shops open at 12:00 noon and close at 19:00 in the afternoon (open all afternoon and the first two afternoon hours)
israeli_free_or_partitial_free_dependend: Work-free or partially work-free for members of the Israelite religious community in accordance with the collective agreement.
mostBusinessesHaveClosed: Not official holiday but most businesses have closed.
noHolidayButComonlyObsersvedGovermentFin: Not a statutory holiday, but it is commonly observed by all levels of government, financial institutions and some businesses.
northernTasmania: Observed in all parts of Tasmania north of (but not including) Oatlands and Swansea.
official_holiday_most_only_schools_and_a: Holiday according to state law, often affects only schools, offices and authorities.
onlyAugsburg: The Augsburg Peace Festival is a public holiday only in the city of Augsburg (but not in the surrounding area).
onlyMoselleBas-RhinHaut-Rhin: Regional in the departments of Moselle, Bas-Rhin and Haut-Rhin
publicServiceWorkers: Statutory for public service workers. Many employers give theier employees days off that may not be statutory holiday.
retailBusinessesMustBeClosed: Not a public holiday, but retail businesses must be closed
royalHobartRegatta: Public holiday for a large part of southern and eastern Tasmania
sales_are_allowed_to_work_in_special_cas: If the day falls on a working day, employees may be employed in sales outlets under special conditions.
schoolsAndSomePublicServices: Schools and some public services close for the day
swiss1AG: Legally recognized only if it does not fall on a Tuesday or Saturday. The historical reason for this rule is that in order to ensure basic services, there should never be three consecutive days off. Today, this rule is hardly observed, so as a rule, there is a rest from work in any year.
swiss2AG: Although it is not an official bank holiday, the vast majority of companies only work until midday. If it falls on a Monday, work is suspended all day almost everywhere.
swiss1NE_BT: Only legally recognized if it falls on a Monday. In practice, however, Berchtold's Day is usually observed in every year.
swiss1NE_ST: Only legally recognized if it falls on a Monday.
swissa: Holiday equivalent to Sundays or other legally recognized holiday only in some municipalities of the canton. However, for some widely celebrated events, restrictions or celebrations may be expected in the other parts of the canton as well.
swissB: Legally recognized public day of rest in the entire canton
swissC: Legally recognized half holiday (usually from 12:00 p.m.) in the entire canton
swissc: Legally recognized half holiday (usually starting at 12:00 p.m.) for public employees only, but usually observed by all work groups
swissD: Not recognized by law, but usually observed by all work groups in the canton.
swissd: Not recognized by law, but it is usually observed in some municipalities
whitMondayGreece: The feast of the Holy Spirit has been designated as an official holiday for the State. Private businesses and shops observe it when it has been designated as a holiday by law, collective Labour agreement, or by business habit and custom.
ignore_battery_dialog_body:
Please enable the \"ignore battery usage permission\" so that the app can keep running in background.

This is to make sure that notifications work reliably!

It won't drain much battery since scheduling notifications is the only thing the app does in background
inKerzers: Only in the municipality of Kerzers
newEventDialogDescription: What kind of entry do you want to create?
no_calendar_found: No calendars found on the device
notification_channel_description: Used to remind you of upcoming public holidays
notification_channel_with_sound_descript: Used to remind you of upcoming public holidays with push sound
noWritableCalendarSelected: Click here to select a calendar to create calendar entries
onboarding_calendar_select_subtitle: Select the calendars you want to have displayed in the app
onboarding_notification_subtitle: Select your preferred days and time for notifications
onboarding_notification_title: When would you like to be notified about upcoming public holidays?
onboarding_state_select_only_holidays_su: Select your state for which you want to see public holidays
onlyLocalEntry: For e.g. vacations, birthdays, etc. (only saved in this app)
purchase_description: Your purchase will not renew automatically. Upon expiration, it will require manual repurchase to maintain access. With the purchase, you gain unrestricted access to view all upcoming public holidays, although this access will expire after one year.
purchase_dialog_description:
Thank you for using our app!

Currently, you have access to the upcoming %d months of public holidays. If you need more, you can unlock all future public holidays below.
rate_dialog_1_to_3_stars: Sorry to hear that. What can we change to make the app better?
rate_dialog_4_stars: Brilliant! Is there anything we can improve?
rate_dialog_5_stars: Brilliant! Would you take the time to rate the app?
rate_dialog_please_rate_text: Sorry for the interruption. We would really appreciate it if you could give us feedback!
report_edittext_description:
Thank you so much for taking the time to improve the app.❤️
We will try to correct the public holidays as soon as possible!
report_holiday_error_title: Report wrong or missing public holidays
school_holidays_available_till_date: School holidays are updated continuously, however, they are entered to the current status only up to the %s.
select_create_event_default: Please select which entry you want to create
selectedCalendarNotDisplay: Selected calendar is not displayed in the app
settings_improve_translation_description:
Thank you for wanting to improve the app's translation.

Your efforts are greatly appreciated! ❤️

The improvements you've made will be included in the upcoming app update.
settings_notification_troubleshoot_andro: Unfortunately some manufacturers prevent apps from autostarting or running in the background. This is required for the app to show the public holiday reminder. If the reminder doesn't show up for you, make sure you check the following points:
Make sure you added an exception for the holiday app in the settings page:
To make sure the HoliCal app is not killed in background, please visit dontkillmyapp.com and follow the instructions for your manufacturer.
This is probably already set, but make sure that the notification permission is granted:
settings_notification_troubleshoot_ios: Make sure that the notification permission is granted:
settings_privacy_policy_description:
We save of track _NONE_ of your data.

Calendar information and all other data is only stored on your device and not uploaded anywhere!

The app may need to download up-to-date school holidays every few months, which requires your IP address to be sent to our server. We will not store this information.

Instead of reading a boring privacy policy tap the screen to celebrate! 🎉

If there are any questions please contact us:

Christopher Wolf – Software-Entwicklung
Martinstr. 2
83329 Waging a. See
GERMANY

info@holiday-calendar.app
showCalendar: Vill du visa kalendern %s i appen?
sylt_fhr_amrum_helgoland_und_halligen: Only for Amrum, Föhr, Halligen, Helgoland and Sylt
select_country_has_no_school_holidays: No school holidays available for selected country.
select_country_has_school_holidays: School holidays available for selected country.
select_country_has_partial_school_holida: School holidays may only be partially available for the selected countries.
special_count_as_half_holidays: Public holidays with special regulations are counted as 0.5
notification_problem_text:
It appears there is a problem with notifications not functioning properly.

Please follow the instructions on the troubleshooting page to hopefully resolve this issue.
notification_problem_hint: We are very sorry for this issue. We realise that the reminder feature is the most crucial one in the app. Unfortunately, some manufacturers terminate apps in the background, preventing the app from displaying notifications.
create_calendar_subtitle: Device calendars are NOT synchronised with an account and are only saved on this phone.
can_not_be_empty: The field must not be empty.
export_to_calendar_warning: You are about to export %1\$d public holidays to the %2\$s calendar.
export_start_end_year: Public holidays from the year %1\$d to %2\$d.
please_enter_to_confirm: Please enter %s in the text field to delete the calendar.
delete_calendar_dialog: You are about to delete the following calendar:
delete_calendar_subtitle:
Select a calendar you want to delete.

A confirmation dialogue will appear before the calendar gets deleted.

nagerOptional: Most people take a day's holiday

onboarding_country_select_only_holidays_: Select the country for which you want to see bank holidays.

hide_this_holiday_question: Do you really want to hide this public holiday? You can show it again in the settings.
